prompt: Create a dramatic luxury heraldic emblem wallpaper featuring lion royalty. Use a wide 16:9 cinematic canvas with a deep black background, subtle dark damask patterns, and glowing metallic gold ornamentation. Center the composition on one large forward-facing lion head with intense eyes and a full mane, framed inside an ornate gold shield crest. Place a tall jeweled royal crown directly above the lion, integrated with the shield. Add exactly two side lions: one on the left and one on the right, both sculptural gold lions in roaring side profile, mirrored symmetrically and positioned behind the central shield on decorative gold platforms. Surround the crest with elaborate baroque filigree scrollwork, fleur-de-lis motifs, curved gold borders, and sweeping black satin-like ribbons with gold speckles. Include a smaller shield badge at the bottom center containing a stylized lion head icon. Use high-contrast black and gold lighting, polished reflective metal, glowing rim highlights, golden sparks, and a bright lens flare at the bottom center. Style should be ultra-detailed, regal, symmetrical, premium fantasy heraldry, sharp focus, glossy 3D illustration, no text, no watermark. Customize the palette with brilliant gold, the background with black, the mood with royal and powerful, and the emblem style with baroque heraldic crest.
